decisions.decision: Replace ink splash scroll reveal with katana slash section transitions
decisions.rationale: User didn't like circle clip-path reveal. Katana cuts, section falls like parchment

decisions.decision: Replace SVG parallax layers with japan-bg.jpg fixed background
decisions.rationale: Real image better than CSS-drawn SVGs, background-attachment:fixed for parallax feel

decisions.decision: JP tagline corrected to 規模を広げるシステム、永続するコード
decisions.rationale: Must match EN/TR meaning since animation is a decode effect

decisions.decision: Scramble animation gradually expands from jpText to finalText length
Fallen sections clickable to bring to front (one at a time)
decisions.rationale: Sections overlap after falling, click-to-raise for accessibility

decisions.decision: Contact section has contact-bg.jpg with dark overlay
Timeline line grows dot-to-dot with elastic pulse on arrival
decisions.rationale: Progressive reveal instead of full scrub animation

decisions.decision: Proficiency bars trigger individually per bar viewport entry
decisions.rationale: Instead of all bars filling when section appears
Was hardcoded English with placeholder URLs

decisions.decision: Fire kanji-intro-done when halves split, not after
decisions.rationale: Hero visible before overlay gone, tagline must start immediately

next_action: Phase 3 complete. Run phase verification, then advance to Phase 4 (Audio & Deploy).
context_notes: Phase 3 fully polished through iterative user feedback. All animation features done + extras (section slash, japan-bg, contact bg, footer i18n). Untracked images: contact-bg.jpg (used), katana.png/svg (leftovers from slash attempts), emirhan-3.jpg (profile photo). Ready to close Phase 3 and plan Phase 4.
